items.title: fix(whatsapp): restore implicit reply mentions for LID identities (#4…
items.summary: fix(whatsapp): restore implicit reply mentions for LID identities (#48494) Threads selfLid from the Baileys socket through the inbound WhatsApp pipeline and adds LID-format matching to the implicit mention check in group gating, so reply-to-bot detection works when WhatsApp sends the quoted sender in @lid format. Also fixes the device-suffix stripping regex (was a silent no-op). Closes #23029 Co-authored-by: sparkyrider Reviewed-by: @ademczuk
